series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained to document the administrative activity of each facility by the Business Enterprise (BE) Program. The Administrative Facility file contains records for business continuation for the lifespan of each facility. Records may include: Bureau Grantor Agreement, contracts, permits, addendums, Memorandums of Understanding (MOU), Initial/Revised Inventory Agreement, architectural drawings, and any additional record relating to the administration of the facility.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: life of facility/site three (3) federal fiscal years from date of closure. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Paper: life of facility/site three (3) federal fiscal years from date of closure. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
